profit The executive has 6 hours available for reading after allocating 2 hours to the math problem. profit To finish 480 pages in 6 hours, the required reading speed is 80 pages per hour. profit The excitement level equation is E(t) = 100 * (1.05)^t where t is time in hours. profit After 8 hours, the excitement level calculates to approximately 147.75 units.
